hero.title:
Your Reliable
AI Workforce Partner
hero.subtitle: Practical AI employees backed by dedicated human support.
hero.description: We help businesses deploy AI employees for coding, data, reporting, marketing, customer service, HR, accounting, and daily operations — with real specialists supporting implementation and execution.

aiWorkforceGrid.title: Choose Your AI Employees
aiWorkforceGrid.subtitle: Start with the roles your business needs most. Our team helps you implement and operate them reliably.

aiEmployeeDetails.title: Meet Your AI Employees
aiEmployeeDetails.dedicatedSupportText: Our team helps with setup, customization, operation, and optimization.

whyAIHuman.title: Reliable AI Needs Human Support
whyAIHuman.subtitle: AI tools alone are not enough for real business operations. Enreal AI provides dedicated specialists who help businesses implement, operate, troubleshoot, and optimize their AI workforce.
whyAIHuman.setupSupportDesc: We configure and integrate your AI employees into your existing tools and workflows.
whyAIHuman.workflowCustomizationDesc: Every business is different. We tailor AI operations to match your specific processes.
whyAIHuman.qualityControlDesc: Human oversight ensures accuracy, brand consistency, and reliable output every time.
whyAIHuman.continuousOptimizationDesc: We monitor performance and refine your AI workforce as your business evolves.

workflow.title: How We Build Your AI Workforce
workflow.step1Desc: We start by understanding your daily operations, repeated tasks, documents, customer interactions, reports, and approval processes. This helps us identify where AI models, inference, and workflow automation can create measurable business value.
workflow.step2Desc: We turn repeated business tasks into structured AI workflow modules that can process information, generate outputs, validate results, and support human-in-the-loop review. These modules are designed to be reusable, configurable, and ready for scalable AI execution.
workflow.step3Desc: Selected workflows can be designed to connect with existing tools, internal systems, or future APIs when needed. This allows your AI employees to operate as practical business assistants today, while preparing for token-based usage, workflow automation, and deeper system integration over time.
workflow.step4Title: Deploy with the Right Model Environment
workflow.step4Desc: We help select the suitable model setup for each workflow based on quality, cost, language, speed, privacy, and token consumption. Depending on the use case, workflows can be powered by cloud AI models, model routing, private deployment, or selected self-hosted open-source model environments.

whoThisIsFor.title: Built For Businesses That Need Practical AI Support
whoThisIsFor.smesDesc: Small and medium businesses ready to automate operations without hiring a full tech team.
whoThisIsFor.agenciesDesc: Service agencies looking to scale delivery capacity with reliable AI support.
whoThisIsFor.enterprisesDesc: Larger organizations needing dedicated implementation support for AI workforce deployment.
whoThisIsFor.teamsWithoutAIDesc: Businesses that want practical AI results without building an in-house engineering department.

consultationForm.title: Book a Free AI Workforce Consultation
consultationForm.subtitle: Tell us about your business workflows and we will recommend the right AI employees, workflow modules, and model setup for your needs.
consultationForm.pricingNote: AI workforce deployment plans start from
consultationForm.pricingDisclaimer: * Each plan includes a monthly AI usage allowance, with additional usage billed transparently based on token consumption when workloads exceed the included allowance.
consultationForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business and what you would like to automate...
consultationForm.successMessage: We have received your consultation request. Our team will reach out within 24 hours.
consultationForm.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
consultationForm.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
consultationForm.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
consultationForm.errorNetwork: Network error. Please try again later.

closingCTA.title: Build Your Reliable AI Workforce with Enreal AI
closingCTA.subtitle: From first consultation to full operations, we are your partner in making AI work reliably for your business.

problem.title: Businesses Want AI, But Reliable Implementation Is Still Difficult
problem.subtitle: Most companies struggle to move from AI curiosity to operational reality. You need more than tools — you need a reliable partner.
problem.repetitiveWorkflowsDesc: Teams spend hours on manual data entry, reporting, and routine tasks that drain productivity.
problem.overloadedTeamsDesc: Skilled staff are buried in operational work instead of focusing on high-value strategy.
problem.fragmentedDataDesc: Information is scattered across systems, making it impossible to get a unified view.
problem.inconsistentSupportDesc: Customer service quality varies by shift, leading to frustrated clients and lost revenue.
problem.lackAIExpertiseDesc: You know AI can help, but you do not have the in-house talent to implement it reliably.

solution.title: Reliable = AI + Human
solution.subtitle: We combine agentic AI capabilities with dedicated human implementation support to deliver outcomes you can trust.
solution.keyMessage: Every AI employee is backed by a dedicated human staff member
solution.keyMessageDesc: You are never left alone with automation. Our team monitors, validates, and steps in whenever human judgment is required.

pricing.title: Flexible Deployment Based On Your Workflow
pricing.subtitle: Every business has different workflows. We provide customized pricing based on the AI employees selected, workflow complexity, integrations, and support level.
pricing.note: We will recommend a suitable deployment plan after understanding your business needs.

deployment.title: Flexible AI Workforce Deployment
deployment.subtitle: Choose the deployment model that fits your organization's size, maturity, and compliance needs.
deployment.internalAIDesc: Deploy AI employees within your own infrastructure. Full control, full ownership, managed by your team with our setup support.
deployment.internalAIBestFor: Enterprises with dedicated IT teams and strict data governance requirements.
deployment.managedAIDesc: We host, manage, and operate your AI workforce end-to-end. You get the results; we handle the infrastructure.
deployment.managedAIBestFor: SMBs and teams who want immediate results without technical overhead.
deployment.hybridAIDesc: The best of both worlds. Critical functions run internally; overflow and specialized tasks are managed by us.
deployment.hybridAIBestFor: Growing businesses that need flexibility, scalability, and redundancy.

footer.brandText: The intelligence layer that scales business operations without increasing headcount.
footer.homeBrandText: Your Reliable AI Workforce Partner. Practical AI employees backed by dedicated human implementation support.

aiEmployeeSummaries.aiCodingEngineer: Builds and maintains software with human-guided architecture oversight.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiDataAnalyst: Transforms raw data into actionable business intelligence with human validation.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiReportSpecialist: Produces accurate, formatted reports on schedule with human fact-checking.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiCreativeDirector: Creates on-brand visual and written content with human creative oversight.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiSocialMediaInfluencer: Manages social presence, content calendars, and community engagement.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiCustomerService: Handles inquiries, tickets, and support workflows with human escalation paths.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiSecretary: Manages scheduling, correspondence, and administrative tasks effortlessly.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiHRManager: Supports recruitment, onboarding, and internal HR coordination.
aiEmployeeSummaries.aiAccountant: Manages bookkeeping, invoicing, and financial reporting with accountant review.

aiCodingEngineer: Write and refactor production code across stacks
Automate testing, CI/CD, and deployment pipelines
Review code and enforce quality standards
aiDataAnalyst: Automate data cleaning and pipeline workflows
Monitor KPIs and detect anomalies in real time
aiReportSpecialist: Generate financial, operational, and sales reports
Schedule recurring report delivery on time
aiCreativeDirector: Generate marketing copy, blogs, and ad creatives
Maintain brand voice across all channels
Produce design concepts and creative briefs
aiSocialMediaInfluencer: Schedule and publish content across platforms
Engage with comments, DMs, and community
Track trends and analyze growth metrics
aiCustomerService: Answer FAQs and resolve common issues instantly
Route complex tickets to the right department
aiSecretary: Draft emails, memos, and routine correspondence
Organize files and track action items
aiAccountant: Automate invoice generation and payment tracking
Generate P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow reports
